item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, bahkan di AS, ada batasan pada kebebasan untuk mencegah kerusakan besar-besaran.

notes: Agent A begins pro-society and remains moderately supportive by the end, but repeatedly frames rights as protected within broader social impact. Agent B begins rights-first, then moves toward balance by acknowledging limits on freedom and proportional restrictions while still defending individual liberty as the democratic foundation.
